name: The World Poker Store, Inc.
summary: The World Poker Store, Inc. runs and manages poker tournaments in the United States and internationally. It offers playing cards, poker books, poker chips, poker DVDs, poker supplies, poker tables, poker chip sets, poker chip cases, and wood chip cases. The company sells products to casinos, card rooms, online poker sites, and players; and online. The World Poker Store, Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Bloomington, Minnesota.
